Runed Fighters Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 36
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MNK
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Quest Name
Where is Marcia Attamilgad?

Adventure Merchants


North Ro
Merchant Name Cost Faction TS Skill
Marcia Attamilgad [Rare Items] 30
Nobles

Zone Name
North Ro
Once dropped by frenzied pox scarab in Old Sebilis.

Post Comment
Does not exist
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2008 at 1:02 PM Rating: Decent
Ukiki
Scholar
28 posts
I know, I know... but sometimes you gotta prove the inevitable. But truly after 2 days of camping that SoB, that RFS doesn't exist. The only 2hb you'll get is that IFS.

That makes me a very sad clown.

Jaquo "Da'Jester" Shiffon
85th & Mofishing Paladin
▲ Page top
Bought one
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2005 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262133437
5 posts
I recently decided to twink a toon and thought it would be fun to put this on a low-level monk. This did turn out to be a fun staff to play with from 1-35, especially with a Cloak of Flames backing it up.

When I started searching for this, I saw one for 150k in the bazaar (Bertox server). Since both the seller and I agreed that 150k is insanely high, we agreed on 45k and I bought the staff.

About two months later, I'm done with the staff (on to bigger and better weapons) and I'm looking to get rid of it. It doesn't look like anyone else is willing to spend quite as much as I was for it. Does anyone know the going price on one of these, as of September 2005?

Rastiz
Monk of Bertoxxulous
▲ Page top
RFS ROCKS!
QuoteReply
# May 21 2003 at 3:16 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257569296
21 posts
I was recently given this weapon by a monk changing servers and it is SICK!! I was using a Peacebringer before 28/30 i beleive.... there is no comparison!! I kill mobs twice as fast as with the PB leaving me with more health than i would otherwise have. I have not used an IFS but since it is close to the stats as a PB i would assume that it would be comperable. I can get in up to about 10 hits before the mob even touches me! (i have SCHW too though). THe only problem is too much aggro... I am the only person that has aggro in a group even with twinked Shadowknights and Warriors. My only question concerns the price (not that i ever plan on selling it =D, just curious) . I've heard anywhere from 4k to 30k. Has anyone purchased this item or sold it?

Dekezz 36 Monk ~ Prexus
Chixdigum 44 drOOd ~ Prexus
▲ Page top
RE: RFS ROCKS!
QuoteReply
# Dec 08 2003 at 9:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248259056
View User Forum
43 posts
I had this and sold it for 9k. It was great. The biggest problem with this item is the wt. and the aggro.
▲ Page top
RE: RFS ROCKS!
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2003 at 11:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258697360
232 posts
the aggro problem is because you are level 36 =) when you group with better tanks you wont have those probs anymore plus you can FD quick to get rid of aggro and keep fighting =)
▲ Page top
RFS comeback
QuoteReply
# May 04 2003 at 9:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771948127
Scholar
46 posts
I agree about bringing RFS - or something similar back in business.

Not many people like fast 2hb, we all know since the damage bonus change that they do not do as much damage as before, but still... I myself prefer 2hb weapons and I always liked RFS despite it's damage handicap because of the way it looks when fighting and the 2hb swing sound.

I would like to see something of similar sort, mabye a 24/25 or something with some sort of a proc or nice stats. With all the new weaponry coming out lately I'm quite disapointed that no fast 2hb have been introduced =(
▲ Page top
Bring it back!
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2002 at 11:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779680837
3 posts
It strikes me that with the advent of Luclin you can acquire some pretty cool weapons, looking at some of the 1 handers and 2 handers for PAL/SK i've seen weapons with stats like 24 20 or thereabouts and 2 handers with even better ratios. Now to my point, surely this weapon is no longer too good to be in the game and i wonder why they can't reintroduce it. Its not over-powering considering what u can now acquire. I feel they should look at some of the things they've removed and see if any of the new-ish expansions offer superior items, meaning they could bring them back without too much hassle. I know not everything could come back because some things were way too good but most i feel are not over powered in todays equipment scene
▲ Page top
RE: Bring it back!
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2003 at 2:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778812983
8 posts
Dropped in Seb for me less than a month ago

QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 10:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248259056

Well I (my 52 monk Mekiku) bought one today for 7.5k. It rocks!.. I really liked my Wu's Quivering Staff (23/28) but it was 9 stone. This is also 3 stone lighter. With my SCHW and this RFS I cut thru them bad guys like a ginsu blade..

▲ Page top
RFS vs.TS vs. IFS
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2002 at 7:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780128791
84 posts
Well, all weapons have about the same dmg ratio and all are very nice weapons but what about when we add haste?? 75% of monk on Fennin Ro have a haste item, most have FBSS. This staff with FBSS is 19/17, TS is 29/25 with proc, and IFS is 38/33. Then you gotta add in all the other factors. IFS has WAY more dmg bonus then either weapon and is lighter with 4 weight then 6 stones on RFS and the 10 stones on TS. Weight is VERY important to monks and 10 weight basically means all your other armor has to weight like 8 pounds depending on lvl to stay under weight without losing huge ac. Never heard about a speed dmg bonus for having weapon under 26 dly but it can't be too much since i tested myself against a 40 monk (me being 36 with kd) He had a jmace and i watched him hit awhile.. he maxed out at 36 and was hitting on average in the mid 20s, i hit with my kd and hit 46 with average around mid 30s. Keep in mind i was lower lvl then him and prolly will hit low 50s when i am lvl 40. His weapon was 9/15 and mine 14/23 each of us with our haste items (him fbss, me SCHW) If anyone can post a link to any information on this weapon delay/dmg bonus please do. Otherwise, this is my opinion.
▲ Page top
DMG bonus
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2002 at 2:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251736848
3 posts
Dude, dmg bonus is different for people of different level.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 10 2001 at 2:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) dmg bonus was changed to 6 now =)

QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2002 at 8:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756539561
28 posts
Damage bonus is player based. Lvl and class of perosn looking at it change damage bonus.

# Nov 01 2001 at 1:57 PM Rating: Decent

6 posts
Supposedly it still drops, but has been moved to Veeshan's peak
▲ Page top
Not that great
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 12:57 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This thing isnt as great as everyone thinks. You could do more damage with a tranquil staff or an IFS because this thing has no 2h dmg bonuse. Any 2h weapon with a dly of 20 or lower gets no 2h bonus damage. Its basicly like having a 19/20 1hb in your main hand with fire bettle eye in you offhand.
▲ Page top
RE: Not that great
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2002 at 2:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767500717
12 posts
Yes it has no 2handed dmg bonus, but it gets its damage bonus applied much more then a TS or IFS. This is better then a IFS for the same reason a jade mace is better then a knuckle duster. It does cause more aggro then an IFS, so on raids sometimes it is better to use a IFS over RFS

.

▲ Page top
RE: .
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2001 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750976102
281 posts
well ton po's staff never made it to live server .

my vote for best tradeable monk staff would be the "tranquil staff" its dmg29 del30 and procs 100blows( 150dd with up to 10sec stun unresistable ) im even told the stun isnt resistable by gods or dragons , iv'e never actualy used one on a god so i cant vouche for it but i have been told by more then one monk using this staff that it does stun gods

once again this is just my opinion not a fact
▲ Page top
Well
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2001 at 12:17 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591762535220
View User Forum
80 posts
Actually it's not Ton Po's Staff of Learning it's called Ton Po's Bo stick of Understanding (what a tongue twister!) You silly druids never cease to amaze/befuddle me =P
2 things about that staff...
A) It dropped only once on test, and
B) That item is NOT LIVE... you will never see one unless you meet the monk on test who has it.
There's some 40/35 VP staff, but it won't get the 40+ delay damage bonus.


This thing (RFS, the item this thread is about) is sickening, 19/20 is a lot better than the tranquil staff (29/30) simply because of your damage bonus, since you're swinging much more than with the TS.

Edit: The Tranquil staff has an uber proc: 120 damage and 8 second or so stun. the stun part of it cannot be resisted. So I'd say go with that one when you hit 50 and it finally procs. Without the proc, RFS is much better :)
▲ Page top
RE: Well
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2005 at 10:15 PM Rating: Decent

74 posts
ACTUALLY the staff is live... there are like 3 on EMarr in the bazaar. of course it must be hella rare being around 150-200k ea =\

# Jan 29 2001 at 2:44 AM Rating: Default

this weapon has been nerfed in a patch a while ago regarding that this weapon is too powerful for a warrior to use making them superior to further races including the monk with dmg dealing (crippling blows, criticals, etc.) so it has now been reduced to monk only
